title: neolloydia beguinii
intro: Neolloydia beguinii, also known as the 'Ornament of the Day of the Dead', is a type of cactus plant that belongs to the Euphorbiaceae family. It is traditionally used in Mexican folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Neolloydia beguinii include its ability to treat skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of the plant often involve the use of its latex, which is typically mixed with other ingredients to create topical creams and ointments.
